body.title: PROC_TRAINING_PASS — automated self-training via inner Claude
body.result: D270: training_pass.py reads cloud escalations from reasoning_calls.log, calls call_inner_cc_long (Haiku+prompt caching) for gap analysis, deposits INTERPRETIVE memories. PROC_TRAINING_PASS habit seeded. 3 tests, 567 total passing.
body.description: start_training_pass() tool + PROC_TRAINING_PASS habit (same shape as start_reading_bootstrap): reads last N turn traces where cloud was used, spawns inner Claude (Haiku by default) via revised inner_cc with long_running=True, deposits INTERPRETIVE/NARRATIVE_GAP memories from identified gaps. TTL-gated, schedulable. Depends on T-inner-cc-revamp.
